candidate.intendedPlayerFacingMeaning: Combine the strongest measured phase-window signal with live-authority path families and explicit late-group protection.

phaseDurationCompiler.protectedGroupPolicy: Groups 4 and 5 are excluded from phase-duration controls unless listed in protectedGroupOptInGroups.

invariantsPreserved: active score windows do not regress
center-lane bias remains below the trial floor
group 4 aggregate score stays at or above baseline
group 4 and group 5 baseline object-track floors are protected
group 4 and group 5 visible timing deltas stay within the protected-group timing limits unless explicitly opted in
group 5 aggregate score stays at or above baseline
late boss-led cleanup does not become the casualty of group 1 tuning
multi-target lane share does not regress
phase order remains group 1 through group 5
target count and no-combat challenge meaning are preserved
candidate.expectedMetricMovement: Potential total object-track lift through phase-order/window fit while preserving groups 4 and 5.

summary.read: The compiled phase-duration semantic candidate moves Stage 7 browser-visible timing/path behavior, but it does not satisfy the focused motion/profile proxy.

sourceReadyBlockers: The compiled candidate does not pass the motion/profile proxy guard.
A real source candidate still needs full motion/profile, strict conformance, before/after visual evidence, scoreable-route, and safety checks.
